name: tcg_troveapi
description: A small FastAPI project with users and listings.

scripts.prod:gate: python -m ruff check . && python -m pytest -q && python -m scripts.prod_preflight --env-file .env && npm run ui:parallel
scripts.ui:lighthouse: npm run ui:lighthouse:home && npm run ui:lighthouse:listings
scripts.ui:all: npm run ui:flows && npm run ui:a11y && npm run ui:lighthouse
scripts.ui:parallel:local: concurrently -n flows,a11y,lh "npm run ui:flows" "npm run ui:a11y" "npm run ui:lighthouse"
scripts.ui:parallel: start-server-and-test ".venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8010" http-get://127.0.0.1:8010 "npm run ui:parallel:local"
scripts.ci:smoke: npm run assets:css:minify && npm run ui:parallel
